title: Chandigarh、Chandigarh — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Chandigarh、Chandigarh的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Chandigarh是Chandigarh的一个城市，人口约1,150,000。India’s first planned city, designed by Le Corbusier, known for its modernist architecture, Rock Garden, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
